examples: The domain controlled by an archduke or archduchess.
Belonging to or befitting an archduke or his archduchy.
Empress Elisabeth of Austria (Sisi) also visited Archduke in Mallorca.
The 76-carat Archduke Joseph diamond, described as internally flawless, comes from India's famous Golconda mines.
Archduke Ferdinand, the guy who was shot and ended up being World War I.
